page_title: "pdnd_client_purpose Resource - PDND"
description: |-
  Manages a purpose association on a PDND client.
---

# pdnd_client_purpose (Resource)

Links a purpose to a PDND client. The association is immutable — any change triggers replacement.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pdnd_client_purpose" "link" {
  client_id  = data.pdnd_client.example.id
  purpose_id = pdnd_purpose.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) Client UUID
- `purpose_id` (String) Purpose UUID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID: client_id/purpose_id

## Import

```shell
terraform import pdnd_client_purpose.link cc0e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440040/990e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440000
```
